filter_pushdown.acceleration: zone_map_block_skip — binary search on lineitem_shipdate_zonemap.bin to find contiguous block range [first_block, last_block]; skip 514/600 blocks (~86% skip rate)

filter_pushdown.note: Applied per-row on qualifying block range; branch-free FP comparison
Applied per-row on qualifying block range; branch-free FP comparison

data_structures.aggregation: thread_local_double_accumulator — scalar SUM, no GROUP BY, no hash table; each thread holds one double; final reduce via sequential addition of 64 values

index_usage.layout: [uint32_t num_blocks=600] then 600 x [int32_t min_val, int32_t max_val, uint32_t row_count]
index_usage.skip_logic: skip block b if zone.max_val < 8766 OR zone.min_val >= 9131; binary search for first block where max_val >= 8766 and last block where min_val < 9131; qualifying blocks form a contiguous run
index_usage.expected_skip: 514 of 600 blocks skipped; 86 blocks (~8.6M rows) remain for column scan

scan_details.access_method: mmap — reinterpret_cast column binary files as typed pointer arrays; zero-copy sequential access
scan_details.per_row_kernel: if (sd >= 8766 && sd < 9131 && disc >= 0.05 - 1e-10 && disc <= 0.07 + 1e-10 && qty < 24.0) local_revenue += price * disc
scan_details.vectorization: branch-free mask-based conditional accumulation; compiler auto-vectorizes with AVX2 (4 doubles per 256-bit register); shipdate re-check inside block handles partial boundary blocks

parallelism.note: morsel size ~131K rows targets L3 cache reuse (44MB / 64 threads / 4 columns x 8 bytes ≈ 22K rows minimum; use 131K for amortized overhead); qualifying range ~8.6M rows → ~66 morsels across 64 threads
parallelism.synchronization: thread_local_merge — each thread accumulates into a private double; after parallel region, main thread sums 64 accumulators; zero contention during scan

physical_plan.memory_pattern: streaming_sequential — all four column files accessed left-to-right within the qualifying block range; hardware prefetcher fully effective; no random access

breakdown.column_data_read: 86 blocks x 100000 rows x 4 columns x 8 bytes = ~275MB; with mmap and 64-thread parallel streaming on HDD ~10-15ms
breakdown.filter_and_accumulate: ~8.6M rows x 4 FP comparisons + conditional multiply-add; AVX2 processes 4 doubles/cycle; ~2-5ms at 64 threads
